== Notes for [[Item:Q112623|Q112623]] ==

Al-Mansur Ibn Abi Aamir married Abda, daughter of Sancho Garcés king of Navarra, who bore him a son by the name of Abd al-Rahman. He was commonly known as Sanchuelo (Little Sancho, in Arabic: Shanjoul).

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Urraca_Fern%C3%A1ndez#Matrimonios_y_descendencia

Urraca de Pamplona la Vascona, entregada en 982 a Almanzor, adoptó el nombre árabe de «Abda». Antes de ingresar en un convento le dio un hijo, Abderramán, llamado «Sanchuelo» por su parecido con su abuelo Sancho.

Also Known as la Vascona, the Basque.

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q29441559 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000002187750545

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
